arabic_text: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
english_text: So glorify the Praises of your Lord, and ask for His Forgiveness. Verily, He is the One Who accepts the repentance and forgives.
alt_text: Image of Quran 110:3 (Surah al-Nasr, verse 3) with Arabic ayat and English translation. The phrase 'وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ' is underlined in red.
notes: Quran widget image with English (not Urdu) translation — unusual for this chapter. The red underline emphasises the imperative to seek forgiveness.
